content.full_text:
Fern Polrrrcel PnecrrcEs CoiraMrssroN
428 J Street. Suite 620 . Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660. Fax (916) 322-0886
Novernber 27,2002
Diane M. Fishburn
Olson, Hagel & Fishburn,LLP
555 Capitol Mall, Suite 1425
Sacramento, CA95814
Re
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-297
Dear Ms. Fishburn
This letter is in response to your request for advice on behalf of Jack O'Connell
and other candidates for statewide elective office regarding the application of certain
provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 You have asked the following
questions:
l. 
Does Government Code section 85316 apply to the carnpaign committees
of candidates for statewide elective office in the November 5, 2002 election? If the
candidates were elected to the offices they sought in the November 5,2002 election, and
their committees had no debt, may the committees continue to accept contributions after
November 5,2002?
2. 
If the candidates may continue to accept contributions after November 5,
2002, do any contribution limits apply to the funds raised by these committees?
These are essentially the same questions that were asked in the Fishburn Advice
Letter, No. A-02-257. We anticipate that the Commission will consider these and other
related issues at its December 13,2002 meeting. Therefore, we decline to provide advice
at this time.
' Gove.n-ent Code sections 81000 - 9l}l4. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections
18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.


File No. W-02-297
Page No. 2
If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916)
322-s660.
Sincerely
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
HBAjg
I : \Advi cel. tr s\W - 02 -29 7
